---
title: 'Fingers - You are smart...'
date: '2012-08-05T02:11:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Connor David Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '38834258109157236'
blogger_filename: '/2012/08/fingers-you-are-smart.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Connor David Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Funny'
---

So you turn to me tonight as you are in bed. I'm saying goodnight and putting Preston to bed. You ask, yet another, question. This nights big question: "Daddy... DADDY... Daddy...." I say "Yessy?" You hold up your hand in the shape of a sign language "Y" and say: "If this finger is called the pinky and this is called the thumb. What are these fingers called?" VERY CUTE. I say: "That is your Index Finger, Middle Finger, and Ring Finger." To which you reply: "Why do they call it the Ring Finger?" I say: "Because that's where most people put their rings." You say: "Not me! I put them on whichever finger it fits on... usually it's my thumb because it's the BIG one!"<br />
<br />
<br />
I love the things you come up with!
